title: Bisulfite-free epigenomics and genomics of single cells through methylation-sensitive restriction.
author: Niemoller C Wehrle J Riba J Claus R Renz N Rhein J Bleul S Stosch JM Duyster J Plass C Lutsik P Lipka DB Lubbert M Becker H
content: S-EPMC7851132 PMC7851132 Bisulfite-free epigenomics and genomics of single cells through methylation-sensitive restriction. Single-cell multi-omics are powerful means to study cell-to-cell heterogeneity. Here, we present a single-tube, bisulfite-free method for the simultaneous, genome-wide
